title: Driver no-power checks
body: Confirm the charger display and LED state are completely off.
Check whether the nearby isolator or upstream breaker has been switched off or tripped.
If power is not restored after the visible checks, escalate with a wider context photo.

title: Local-site tripping response
body: Inspect the breaker state and capture a proof photo before resetting anything.
Attempt one supervised reset only if site SOP allows it and no hazard is visible.
Escalate if the breaker trips again or if heat or damage is observed.

title: Remote ops charging-slow review
body: Collect the configured current setting or screenshot showing the reduced output state.
Confirm whether the vehicle may be limiting acceptance or if the issue is charger-side.
Use the evidence to decide whether field dispatch is actually required.

title: Remote ops screenshot/error review
body: Review the screenshot or error text against known app-log patterns.
Request a fresh screenshot or screen recording if the text is incomplete.
Escalate to technician only if the remote evidence indicates a hazardous or irrecoverable fault.

title: Hazardous unknown case handling
body: Preserve the charger state and do not attempt additional resets or ad-hoc fixes.
Capture the required proof photo or measurement requested by triage.
Dispatch technician review with the hazard details and matched known-case context.
